name: flight_update
description: The traveler's booking changed (gate change or delay). Re-check the booking and tell the traveler, in one calm Hindi sentence, the new gate and that the wheelchair is confirmed again.

name: family_message
description: A message from the traveler's family member. Relay it verbatim in Hindi, prefixed with the family member's name.

name: show_status
description: Show or update a status card on the app UI (flight, wheelchair, or facility).
